    <item>
      <title>Jason Kidd's future could be in doubt after Mavericks hire Masai Ujiri</title>
      <description>Jason Kidd wanted to be the team president of the Dallas Mavericks. Now the Mavs have hired Masai Ujiri, and the new president has stopped short of endorsing Kidd as his long-term head coach.</description>

    <item>
      <title>The 'NBA Defensive Players of the Year' quiz</title>
      <description>The NBA began awarding the Defensive Player of the Year following the 1982-83 season. Since then, the award has been given out 42 times. How many of the 42 can you name in five minutes?</description>
      <pubDate>06 May 2026 00:00:41 -0400</pubDate>

      <category>Victor Wembanyama</category>

    <item>
      <title>Austin Reaves endures historically poor playoff shooting game in Lakers' loss</title>
      <description>Without a co-star to rely on, LeBron James and the Los Angeles Lakers suffered a 108-90 loss to the Oklahoma City Thunder in the first game of their second-round series. </description>
      <pubDate>06 May 2026 01:02:38 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/austin_reaves_endures_historically_poor_playoff_shooting_game_in_lakers_loss/s1_13132_43811376</link>

        <media:credit> Alonzo Adams-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Los Angeles Lakers guard Austin Reaves drives around Oklahoma City Thunder guard Cason Wallace in the first half during Game 1 of the second round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Paycom Center. </media:title>
